svg:
Parallel versus fork in the saga DSL Side-by-side comparison: parallel runs branches inside one Board task with one worker and a single audit trail; fork spawns separate Board tasks each with their own worker, lifecycle, and audit trail.
parallel intra-saga concurrency
Task A — one worker, one audit trail
normalize
parallel
credit
fraud
history
consolidate
join: all · any · quorum
fork inter-saga concurrency
Task A claim_intake
Task B1 loss
Task B2 legal
Task B3 comms
Children: separate Board cards linked back by parent_task_id
Drawing on existing primitives: parent_task_id field already exists in your TaskRecord pattern. wait: false · true · join later
